# DevVault
DevVault is a privacy-focused, local-first developer knowledge operating system and snippet manager.

## Features
- Store markdown notes and code snippets securely on your local device.
- Sync seamlessly to your private GitHub repository for secure backup and version control.
- Designed strictly for developers, built with Next.js, React, and TailwindCSS.
- Offers rich text editing via TipTap.
- Completely free and open-source.

## Access
Login requires GitHub authentication to allow repository synchronization.
Site URL: https://mydevvault.vercel.app
